A

applyExpense(double) - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
Deducts an expense amount from the remaining balance.
applyRollover(LocalDate, double) - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
Updates the cycle after a new day is detected.

B

BudgetCycle - Class in com.masroofy.model
Represents one active allowance/budget cycle.
BudgetCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate, double) - Constructor for class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
Creates a new active budget cycle.

C

calculateInitialLimit(double, long) - Method in class com.masroofy.service.LimitCalculator
Calculates the first daily limit from allowance and number of days.
calculateSpentRatio(double, double) - Method in class com.masroofy.service.LimitCalculator
Calculates what percentage of the original allowance has been spent.
Category - Enum Class in com.masroofy.model
Represents the spending category chosen by the user when recording an expense.
com.masroofy.controller - package com.masroofy.controller
 
com.masroofy.model - package com.masroofy.model

com.masroofy.ui - package com.masroofy.ui
 
CycleController - Class in com.masroofy.controller
Coordinates budget-cycle creation and daily rollover behavior.
CycleController(CycleRepository, TransactionRepository, LimitCalculator) - Constructor for class com.masroofy.controller.CycleController
Creates a controller with required collaborators.
CycleRepository - Class in com.masroofy.repository
Stores budget cycle records.
CycleRepository() - Constructor for class com.masroofy.repository.CycleRepository
 

D

DashboardController - Class in com.masroofy.controller
Prepares the dashboard view model by combining cycle, transaction, and calculation data.
DashboardController(CycleController, TransactionRepository, LimitCalculator) - Constructor for class com.masroofy.controller.DashboardController
Creates a dashboard controller.
daysRemaining(LocalDate) - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle

ExpenseController - Class in com.masroofy.controller
Handles rapid expense logging and threshold notifications.

Creates an expense controller with required collaborators.

Retrieves transaction history for display.

isActive() - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
 
isExpired(LocalDate) - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
 

L

LimitCalculator - Class in com.masroofy.service
Centralises all budget formulas so screens and repositories do not contain calculation rules.
LimitCalculator() - Constructor for class com.masroofy.service.LimitCalculator
 
loadDashboard(LocalDate) - Method in class com.masroofy.controller.DashboardController
Loads all data needed by the dashboard screen.
logExpense(double, Category, String) - Method in class com.masroofy.controller.ExpenseController
Logs an expense, updates the active cycle, and checks whether a threshold alert is needed.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.masroofy.ui.MasroofyApp
Runs a short demonstration of the first seven user stories.
MasroofyApp - Class in com.masroofy.ui
Console entry point used to demonstrate the Masroofy prototype without producing an exe or jar file.
MasroofyApp() - Constructor for class com.masroofy.ui.MasroofyApp
 

N

Wraps notification behavior.

OTHER - Enum constant in enum class com.masroofy.model.Category
 

R

recalculateLimit(double, long) - Method in class com.masroofy.service.LimitCalculator
Recalculates the daily limit after spending or daily rollover.
rolloverIfNeeded(LocalDate) - Method in class com.masroofy.controller.CycleController
Applies daily rollover when the user opens the app on a later day.

S

save(BudgetCycle) - Method in class com.masroofy.repository.CycleRepository
Saves a new active cycle and replaces any previous active cycle.
save(Transaction) - Method in class com.masroofy.repository.TransactionRepository
Saves a transaction.
sendThresholdAlert(double) - Method in class com.masroofy.service.NotificationService
Sends a budget threshold alert to the user.
setActive(boolean) - Method in class com.masroofy.model.BudgetCycle
Sets the active flag.
SpendingSummary - Class in com.masroofy.model
Dashboard value object containing the calculated information shown to the user.
SpendingSummary(double, double, Map<Category, Double>, List<Transaction>) - Constructor for class com.masroofy.model.SpendingSummary
Creates an immutable dashboard summary.
startCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class com.masroofy.controller.CycleController
Starts a new active cycle.
STUDY - Enum constant in enum class com.masroofy.model.Category
 
sumByCategory(String) - Method in class com.masroofy.repository.TransactionRepository
Calculates category totals for chart/insight display.
sumSpent(String) - Method in class com.masroofy.repository.TransactionRepository
Calculates the total amount spent in a cycle.

T

toString() - Method in class com.masroofy.model.Transaction
 
Transaction - Class in com.masroofy.model
Represents a single expense transaction recorded inside a budget cycle.
Transaction(String, Category, double, String) - Constructor for class com.masroofy.model.Transaction
Creates a transaction with a generated id and the current timestamp.
TransactionRepository - Class in com.masroofy.repository
Stores transactions and calculates totals needed by dashboard, history, and notification flows.
TransactionRepository() - Constructor for class com.masroofy.repository.TransactionRepository
 
TRANSPORT - Enum constant in enum class com.masroofy.model.Category
 

U

update(BudgetCycle) - Method in class com.masroofy.repository.CycleRepository
Updates the active cycle after expense logging or rollover.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.masroofy.model.Category
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class com.masroofy.model.Category
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
